channel.title: I think, therefore I am on Sam's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in I think, therefore I am on Sam's Blog

item.title: Life is beautiful. Make it count...
item.description: Summary Trying Hugo for the first time. Hope this is easy and adaptable. Lets begin ….. End So far so good.

item.title: Contact
item.description: This is an example of a custom shortcode that you can put right into your content. You will need to add a form action to the the shortcode to make it work. Check out Formspree for a simple, free form service. Your Name Email Address An email address is required. Message
